StmtSimple.StatementText: UPDATE [Role] SET ParentRoleId = @parentRoleId, RoleType = @roleType, RoleValue = @roleValue, Name = @name, Hidden = @hidden, LastModifiedBy = @byUserId FROM [Role] WHERE Id = @roleId

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [Expr1013] AND [Expr1014] AND [Expr1015] THEN (0) ELSE (1) END
CASE WHEN [Expr1013] AND [Expr1014] AND [Expr1015] AND [Expr1016] AND [Expr1017] THEN (0) ELSE (1) END
CASE WHEN [Expr1014] AND [Expr1015] THEN (0) ELSE (1) END
CASE WHEN [P-INF-Admittance].[dbo].[Role].[RoleType] = CONVERT_IMPLICIT(char(1),[@roleType],0) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END
CASE WHEN [P-INF-Admittance].[dbo].[Role].[Name] = CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nvarchar(255),[@name],0) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END
CASE WHEN [Expr1030] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [Expr1031] IS NULL THEN (1) ELSE NULL END END
CASE WHEN NOT [Pass1035] AND [Expr1034] IS NULL THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
